title: EliteMobs
description: Minidungeons, Arenas, Bosses, Custom Loot, Quests, MMORPG progression & more!
body:
# 🟠 Main Features (100% optional and configurable!) - **Elite Mobs!** Fight against mobs with levels and special powers that show up randomly in your worlds! - **Dungeons, Arenas, Adventures & Events!** Enjoy many dungeons, arenas, adventures and events we made — [about 50% are free!](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/elitemobs/#content) - **One-click installation!** Instantly install and uninstall content! - **Custom Furniture!** With the [**EliteMobs prop pack**](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/freeminecraftmodels/#elitemobs-prop-pack), all of the EliteMobs builds and maps come with their own custom props and furniture pieces! - **Custom Models!** This plugin has [Free Minecraft Models](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/freeminecraftmodels) Integration! - **Self-contained RPG item progression with custom mechanics!** Kill higher level bosses for higher level loot, interact with custom immersive NPCs and use our custom enchanting and repairing systems for elite items! - **Fully translatable!** If you can see it in-game, you can translate it, or use community-made translations! - **Highly responsive support!** [Join the Discord!](https://discord.gg/9f5QSka) - **Want an even better experience?** Works best with [BetterStructures](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/betterstructures), [Free Minecraft Models](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/freeminecraftmodels), [Resurrection Chest](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/resurrectionchest), and [Resource Pack Manager](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/resourcepackmanager) — all free! # 🟠 How to Setup:
Quick setup instructions! | Full permissions list here
# 🟠 Additional downloads:

Click here for every free & premium download with more info!

# 🟠 View More by Magmaguy!

# 🟠 Translations:
Translations **To activate a translation:** Run the command: ``` /elitemobs language ``` **Example:** ``` /elitemobs language spanish.yml ``` Translations can be found in: `~/plugins/EliteMobs/translations` Want to contribute? [Help translate on Crowdin!](https://crowdin.com/project/elitemobs)
# 🟠 Third Party plugin compatibility:
Third Party Plugins EliteMobs can optionally be paired with: - [**FreeMinecraftModels**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/free-minecraft-models.111660/) – custom boss models - [**ResourcePackManager**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/resource-pack-manager.118574/) – automatic resource pack management - [**BetterStructures**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/betterstructures.103241/) – custom buildings with EliteMobs bosses and loot - [**LibsDisguises**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/libs-disguises-free.81/) – disguise bosses as other entities, including player skins - [**DiscordSRV**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/discordsrv.18494/) – post Discord announcements about bosses - [**WorldGuard**](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldguard) – EliteMobs flags for regions - [**PlaceholderAPI**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) – placeholders for leaderboards/chat/tabs - [**Vault**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) – economy integration (not recommended)
# 🟠 Developers:
Developers - [Source code / ReadMe](https://github.com/MagmaGuy/EliteMobs) - [Wiki](https://magmaguy.com/wiki.html#lang=en&article=elitemobs+info.md)
